ITitlePlayersListItem::GetName

Returns the display name for a player as it should appear in the players list.

CONST WCHAR* GetName();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

Returns a pointer to a null-terminated Unicode string containing the player's display name.

Remarks

The display name can contain information in addition to the player's name—for example, whether the player is a guest, the player's score, status, or other text.

It is a valid operation to update the text dynamically between frames. If a change is to occur, the title should call ILivePlayersList::Refresh so the engine picks up the change and re-sorts if necessary.

There is an upper limit of 127 for WCHAR characters preserved at the time a player is unregistered.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Uix.h.

Import Library: Use Uix.lib.
